name: 👋 Hello, I'm Brandol
title: Frontend Developer Senior
about: Creative problem solver with a full-stack skillset, passionate about mastering new technologies and crafting elegant solutions.

description: Building and evolving the interfaces behind Movii's fintech platform with React, Next.js and Angular, from new business features to performance and code health, working under Scrum alongside UX/UI, backend and QA.

Freelance engagement building and maintaining web applications for Banco Santander: a progressive Angular version migration, REST API integration, and a rewrite of the unit test suite that took coverage from 5% to 97%.
Built and maintained REST APIs in Java with SQL databases, plus Angular (v8-11) frontends and Cordova mobile apps, supporting mobile banking projects for Banco FIE and Banco Panamá.
Developed web and mobile applications with Laravel, Angular and .NET for institutional and government platforms, designing REST APIs under SOLID/MVC and working directly with clients on requirements.
